project.title: A Museum Anomaly
project.desc: A psychological thriller game built in Unreal Engine 5 using custom C++ anomaly detection logic. Features dynamic AI behaviour, environmental storytelling, and real-time rendering pipelines.

project.title: Netflix EDA Dashboard
project.desc: Exploratory Data Analysis application developed during IBM internship. Visualises viewer retention trends, content growth patterns, and genre analytics across Netflix streaming datasets.

project.title: The Final Climb
project.desc: A physics-based platformer game optimised for smooth 60fps gameplay. Implemented custom Unreal Engine Blueprint logic for gravity manipulation, momentum preservation, and level progression.

project.title: Neural Net Classifier
project.desc: A supervised learning project implementing multi-layer perceptron for binary and multiclass classification tasks. Achieved 92% accuracy on benchmark datasets using hyperparameter tuning and regularisation techniques.

project.title: Linux Shell Automation Suite
project.desc: A collection of shell scripts for automating repetitive system administration tasks — log rotation, file archival, network diagnostics, and process monitoring — designed for workstation-grade Linux environments.
